{{Quote|Some of us still have a sense of loyalty to the Republic, and do not want to be branded as traitors. I will be there, on Coruscant, on the 16th, to make our voices heard. I believe in the Republic and in the Senate, and do not look to run away like the cowards in the Old World.|Gorothin Vagger|<ref name="HNN49">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|regional/13328_1.html|Andoan Free Colonies Criticize Aqualish}}</ref>}}
'''Gorothin Vagger''' was a [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented the [[Andoan Free Colonies/Legends|Andoan Free Colonies]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Following the secession of [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] and the [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]] and Senator [[Po Nudo/Legends|Po Nudo]], Senator Vagger declared his sector's full allegiance to the Republic.<ref name="HNN49" />

Prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Gorothin and two of his [[Aide/Legends|aides]] were present when [[Junior Representative/Legends|Representative]] [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] proposed the transfer of immediate emergency powers to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], thus triggering the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="DepthCommentary">{{HomeVideoCite|film=2|featurette=Depth Commentary}}</ref>

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], three years later, Vagger was present when Palpatine was rescued by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].<ref name="ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref>
